creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) The internet is being rebuilt for machines
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.
contentSnippet: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.

title: (No AI) Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
author: Emma Roth
content:
![Microsoft 365 Copilot redesign](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/M365Copilot_Hero_BannerImage_1920x1080.webp?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Microsoft is [launching a revamped version](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/05/28/introducing-a-new-design-for-microsoft-365-copilot/) of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft.

The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes with a feature Microsoft calls "progressive disclosure." That means Copilot will present you with tools and controls based on your prompt, instead of showing a bunch of options at once. You can now format your text directly inside Copilot's upgraded prompt box as well, which will expand to fit every …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/939273/microsoft-365-copilot-redesign)

Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft.
The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes with a feature Microsoft calls "progressive disclosure." That means Copilot will present you with tools and controls based on your prompt, instead of showing a bunch of options at once. You can now format your text directly inside Copilot's upgraded prompt box as well, which will expand to fit every …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Claude’s new model is more ‘honest’ when it messes up
author: Jay Peters
content:
![The Claude logo with a overlay of an smart phone on an orange background.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/08/STKB364_CLAUDE_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty."

According [to Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-8), it trains "all \[its\] models to be honest - for instance, to avoid making claims that they can't support." But it notes that "a general problem with AI models is that they sometimes jump to conclusions, confidently presenting their work as making progress despite thin evidence."

The AI lab claims that early testers have found that Opus 4.8 "is more likely to flag uncertainties about its work and less likely to make unsupported claims." In the company's evaluations, Opus 4.8 is "around 4x less likely than its predeces …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/939094/anthropic-claude-4-8-opus-honesty-effort)
